tasks.label: build (merchant-portal) after unifying app pages + removing starfield
build merchant portal preview ghost validation
tsc:merchant-portal:full (no truncation)
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc -b --pretty false --noErrorTruncation 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: tsc:merchant-portal (noErrorTruncation)
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false --noErrorTruncation 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: tsc:merchant-portal (tsconfig.app)
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --pretty false 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: tsc:merchant-portal (tsconfig.app, wide)
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && COLUMNS=200 npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --pretty false 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: tsc:merchant-portal capture output
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && (npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --pretty false > tsc-output.txt 2>&1 || true) && (wc -l tsc-output.txt | cat)

tasks.label: diag: status B (governance gate files)
tasks.command: git status --porcelain=v1 -uall -- scripts/audit-governance.js audit-baselines package.json .vscode/tasks.json | cat

tasks.label: diag: status E (docs + audit-reports + root md)
tasks.command: git status --porcelain=v1 -uall -- docs audit-reports README_APPSTAFF_ACTIVATION.md TPV_100_CERTIFIED.md | cat

tasks.label: git: commit-base
tasks.command: git commit -m "Constitutional hardening: DB laws + operational adapters"

tasks.label: git: verify state
tasks.command: cd /Users/goldmonkey/Projetos/Apps-Proprios/chefiapp-pos-core && git status --porcelain -b && echo '---' && git log -1 --oneline

tasks.label: git: verify state (no pager)
tasks.command: cd /Users/goldmonkey/Projetos/Apps-Proprios/chefiapp-pos-core && git status --porcelain -b && echo '---' && git --no-pager log -1 --oneline

tasks.label: git: amend commit-base with type fixes
tasks.command: cd /Users/goldmonkey/Projetos/Apps-Proprios/chefiapp-pos-core && git add server/amazon/refresh-catalog.ts server/govern-manage/decision-service.ts server/govern/actions-generator.ts server/operational-event-bus/event-bus.ts server/web-module-api-server.ts && git commit --amend --no-edit

tasks.label: git: verify after amend
tasks.command: cd /Users/goldmonkey/Projetos/Apps-Proprios/chefiapp-pos-core && git status --porcelain -b && echo '---' && git --no-pager log -1 --oneline

tasks.label: git: stage commit 1 (governance + go/no-go)
tasks.command: cd /Users/goldmonkey/Projetos/Apps-Proprios/chefiapp-pos-core && git add package.json .vscode/tasks.json audit-baselines scripts/validate-tpv-go-nogo.ts

tasks.label: cherry-pick-continue
tasks.command: git add -A && GIT_EDITOR=true git cherry-pick --continue && echo '---DONE---' && git log --oneline -6

tasks.label: typecheck phase3c
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --pretty false 2>&1 | head -50

tasks.label: check activation errors
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --pretty false 2>&1 | grep -E 'activation|Activation' | head -20 || echo 'No activation errors'

tasks.label: push phase3c
tasks.command: git log --oneline -6 && echo '---' && git push origin main

tasks.label: git: commit B nav
tasks.command:
git add merchant-portal/src/pages/Dashboard/DashboardZero.tsx merchant-portal/src/App.tsx merchant-portal/src/core/flow/CoreFlow.ts merchant-portal/src/pages/BootstrapPage.tsx merchant-portal/src/pages/ComingSoonPage.tsx merchant-portal/src/pages/Onboarding/OnboardingQuick.tsx merchant-portal/src/pages/Onboarding/migration/Step4_TheReveal.tsx && git commit -m 'feat(nav): open operational tools in new browser tabs

- DashboardZero: window.open() for TPV, KDS, Menu, Orders routes
- Add primaryOps array with 4 tools (TPV, KDS, Menu, Orders)
- Update App.tsx routes to /app/* parent structure
- Add legacy redirects: /dashboard -> /app/dashboard, etc.
- CoreFlow: redirect completed users to /app/dashboard
- Update BootstrapPage, OnboardingQuick, Step4_TheReveal redirects
- ComingSoonPage: fix activePath and navigate to /app/dashboard

E2E_NAV: new-tab behavior sealed'

tasks.label: git: commit C docs
tasks.command:
git add merchant-portal/src/pages/TPV/TPV.tsx merchant-portal/src/pages/TPV/KDS/KitchenDisplay.tsx merchant-portal/src/pages/Menu/MenuManager.tsx merchant-portal/src/pages/AppStaff/PulseList.tsx docs/E2E_NAV_VALIDATION_2026-01-08.md && git commit -m 'docs(nav): add document titles and E2E validation checklist

- TPV: document.title = ChefIApp POS — TPV
- KDS: document.title = ChefIApp POS — KDS
- Menu: document.title = ChefIApp POS — Menu
- Orders: document.title = ChefIApp POS — Orders
- Create E2E_NAV_VALIDATION_2026-01-08.md validation checklist

E2E_NAV_SEALED=true'

tasks.label: final verification
tasks.command: echo '=== GIT LOG (last 5) ===' && git --no-pager log --oneline -5 && echo '' && echo '=== GIT STATUS ===' && git status --short && echo '' && echo '=== BUILD CHECK ===' && cd merchant-portal && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10

tasks.label: git: commit phase 4
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'feat: Phase 4 — Multi-Tenant Data Layer (TenantContext, withTenant, TenantSelector)'

tasks.label: git: commit and push cleanup
tasks.command: GIT_PAGER=cat PAGER=cat git add .markdownlint.json skills/chefi-pos/SKILL.md .gitignore && GIT_PAGER=cat PAGER=cat git rm -r --cached merchant-portal/test-results/ 2>/dev/null; GIT_PAGER=cat PAGER=cat git commit -m 'chore: add markdownlint config, fix SKILL.md frontmatter, gitignore test-results' && GIT_PAGER=cat PAGER=cat git push origin core/frozen-v1

tasks.label: verify HTML maps deleted
tasks.command: find docs/architecture -name '*.html' -type f 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && ls -la docs/architecture/appstaff-map* 2>/dev/null && echo 'DONE'

tasks.label: check pen file git state
tasks.command: git ls-files docs/architecture/appstaff-map.pen && echo '---TRACKED---' && git check-ignore docs/architecture/appstaff-map.pen 2>&1 && echo '---IGNORE---' && git diff --stat HEAD -- docs/architecture/appstaff-map.pen && echo '---DIFF-END---'

tasks.label: stage map changes
tasks.command: git add docs/architecture/MAPS_AUDIT_REPORT.md docs/architecture/appstaff-map.html docs/architecture/appstaff-map.pen docs/architecture/appstaff-mapa-por-trabalhador.html && git status --porcelain && echo '---STAGED---'

tasks.label: commit maps work
tasks.command: git commit -m 'docs: add maps audit report, delete old HTML maps — replaced by Pencil diagrams' && echo '---COMMIT-OK---'

tasks.label: typecheck merchant-portal
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo '---TSC-DONE---'

tasks.label: git stage Phase 1
tasks.command: git add .env.example Dockerfile docker-compose.yml merchant-portal/src/core/auth/authKeycloak.ts package.json tsconfig.server.json docker-core/keycloak/ docs/architecture/project-map.html docs/architecture/worker-map.html && git status --porcelain --short && echo '---STAGED---'

tasks.label: git commit Phase 1
tasks.command:
git commit -m 'feat: Phase 1 — Docker builds, Keycloak auth, OIDC flow complete

- tsconfig.server.json: compiles _legacy_isolation/ server code to dist/
- Dockerfile: updated COPY paths from _legacy_isolation/ subdirs
- package.json: added build:server, docker:up/down/build/logs scripts
- docker-compose.yml: added Keycloak 24.0 with auto-import realm config
- authKeycloak.ts: full OIDC Authorization Code flow (code exchange, token refresh, JWT decode)
- chefiapp-realm.json: 5 roles, 2 clients, 3 demo users, tenant/restaurant mappers
- .env.example: added Keycloak environment variables
- HTML maps: project-map.html + worker-map.html for browser viewing' 2>&1 && echo '---COMMIT-OK---'

tasks.label: git commit Phase 1 v2
tasks.command: git commit -m 'feat: Phase 1 - Docker builds, Keycloak auth, OIDC flow complete' 2>&1 && echo '---COMMIT-OK---'

tasks.label: git commit Phase 1 v3
tasks.command: git commit -m 'feat: phase 1 docker builds, keycloak auth, oidc flow' 2>&1 && echo '---COMMIT-OK---'

tasks.label: docker restart
tasks.command: docker compose down --remove-orphans 2>&1 && docker compose up -d 2>&1; echo EXIT_CODE=$?

tasks.label: docker fix orphan
tasks.command: docker rm -f chefiapp-core-postgrest 2>&1 && docker compose up -d 2>&1; echo EXIT_CODE=$?

tasks.label: check port 8080
tasks.command: lsof -i :8080 -t 2>&1 | head -5; echo '---' ; docker ps -a --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}' 2>&1; echo '---PS-END---'

tasks.label: docker up v2
tasks.command: docker rm -f chefiapp-core-keycloak chefiapp-test-rest 2>&1; KEYCLOAK_PORT=8180 docker compose up -d 2>&1; echo EXIT_CODE=$?

tasks.label: docker status
tasks.command: docker ps --filter 'name=chefiapp-' --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}' 2>&1 | grep -E 'chefiapp-(db|keycloak|core-postgrest|webhook|billing|subscription|web-module)' ; echo '---'; docker compose ps 2>&1

tasks.label: docker logs check
tasks.command: docker compose ps 2>&1 | tail -20; echo '===LOGS==='; docker compose logs subscription-ui --tail 30 2>&1; echo '===KC-LOGS==='; docker compose logs keycloak --tail 10 2>&1

tasks.label: rebuild subscription-ui
tasks.command: docker compose build subscription-ui 2>&1 | tail -15 && docker compose up -d subscription-ui 2>&1; echo EXIT_CODE=$?

tasks.label: verify all healthy
tasks.command: sleep 10 && docker compose ps 2>&1 | grep -v 'WARN' | grep -v '^$'

tasks.label: git stage docker fixes
tasks.command: git add Dockerfile docker-compose.yml tsconfig.server.json _legacy_isolation/server/subscription-management-server.ts && git status --short 2>&1 && echo '---STAGED---'

tasks.label: git commit docker fixes
tasks.command: git commit -m 'fix: docker stack builds and runs all 7 services healthy' 2>&1 && echo '---COMMIT-OK---'

tasks.label: shell: stop all supabase containers
tasks.command: docker ps --filter 'name=supabase' --format '{{.Names}}' | xargs -r docker rm -f 2>&1 && echo '---STOPPED---' && docker ps --filter 'name=supabase' --format '{{.Names}}' 2>&1 && echo '---VERIFY---'

tasks.label: shell: tsc:merchant-portal (supabase purge)
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -60 && echo '---TSC-DONE---'

tasks.label: shell: vite build (supabase purge)
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx vite build 2>&1 | tail -25 && echo '---BUILD-DONE---'

tasks.label: shell: git stage supabase purge
tasks.command: git add -A && git status --short 2>&1 | head -40 && echo '---' && git diff --cached --stat 2>&1 | tail -5

tasks.label: shell: git commit supabase purge
tasks.command: git commit -m 'refactor: replace all supabase references with docker core naming' 2>&1 && echo '---COMMIT-OK---'

tasks.label: shell: tsc verify blockers
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo '---TSC-DONE---'

tasks.label: shell: vite build blockers
tasks.command: cd merchant-portal && npx vite build 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo '---BUILD-DONE---'

tasks.label: shell: git commit production readiness
tasks.command: git add -A && git status --short 2>&1 | head -30 && echo '---STAGED---' && git commit -m 'feat: production readiness - migration runner, billing db, keycloak prod, deploy pipeline, secrets cleanup' 2>&1 && echo '---COMMIT-OK---'
